core_mechanism: organization of high-dimensional nonlinear dynamics by a skeleton of unstable invariant sets (equilibria and their stable/unstable invariant manifolds) linked by symmetry-induced heteroclinic connections, which partition state space and guide transient trajectories
brief_reason: The abstract builds a state-space representation whose unstable invariant solutions and the global continuations of their unstable manifolds tessellate the explored region via a web of heteroclinic connections, i.e. a phase-space skeleton steering the transient dynamics.
